mapper.select: SELECT id, title, url, user_id AS userId, create_time AS createTime, likes_count AS likesCount FROM videos WHERE id = ?
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO videos (title,url, user_id,likes_count, create_time) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?,?)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM video_like WHERE video_id = ? AND user_id = ?
mapper.update: UPDATE videos SET likes_count=likes_count+? WHERE id =?
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM videos WHERE title LIKE ?
SELECT id, title, url, create_time, likes_count, user_id FROM videos WHERE title LIKE ? ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT ?, ?
